# Third-party character asset

## RobotExpressive.glb

- Creator: Tomás Laulhé
- Modifications: Don McCurdy
- Source: https://github.com/mrdoob/three.js/tree/dev/examples/models/gltf/RobotExpressive
- License: CC0 1.0

The model is used as a lightweight rigged robot citizen inside the upGradVerse prototype.
